reports.title: Severe Road Disruption: Huge Pothole Circle
reports.description: A wide pothole block near the intersection has caused three motorbike slips in the last 48 hours. Water logging makes it invisible during nighttime.

location.address: Outer Ring Rd near Shell Station, Sector 2

escalation_history.reason: SLA threshold near breech of 24 hours without field deployment

reports.title: Broken Streetlamp causing safety hazard
reports.description: Two major high-sodium streetlights on Lane 4 are completely dark, enabling anti-social activities and making walks risky for senior residents.

location.address: Lane 4, Green Garden Layout Block C

reports.title: Massive Garbage Heap blocking pedestrian path
reports.description: Over 500kg of wet and dry garbage piled outside the civic community center. Breeds flies and smells toxic.

location.address: Civic center boundary, Main Bus Stand Rd

reports.title: Major Main Line Water Leak on Highway cross
reports.description: Water has been spraying 10 feet high from a municipal supply joint pipe since early morning, making road traction slippery and wasting thousands of liters.

location.address: Near Metro Station Pillar 124, West Chord Rd

reports.title: Clogged Underground Drainage causing waste backflow
reports.description: Sanitary sewer line has been heavily clogged with silt and plastic trash. Drainage backflow has filled the front courtyard of four block houses.

location.address: Commercial Street Cross Lane B

escalation_history.reason: Critical health hazard with zero response from local ward sanitary team in 24 hours
escalation_history.remarks: Escalated for emergency vacuum-sucking machine dispatch.

reports.title: Illegal Encroachment of Pedestrian Footpath
reports.description: Temporary commercial steel stalls have completely blocked 50 meters of the public walking track on Brigade Rd, pushing school children into running traffic.

location.address: Brigade Road Pedestrian Walkway, Near Metro Exit

escalation_history.reason: Field inspection delay by Ward 25 supervisor
Encroachers refused clearance; local police assistance requisitioned
escalation_history.remarks: Joint clearance squad eviction set for tomorrow.

reports.title: Severe MG Road Cave-in & Pothole Cluster
reports.description: Major cave-in under the metro line support structure has developed, spanning 5 feet wide and 2 feet deep. Severely threatening road safety.

location.address: MG Road Junction, Opp. Parade Grounds

escalation_history.reason: Critical safety hazard in prestigious high-traffic lane
Structural concrete reinforcement requirements beyond standard repair crew
escalation_history.remarks: Advanced repairs requested from structural contracting division.

escalation_history.reason: Public safety concern escalated to peak administrative office due to soil settling under columns
escalation_history.remarks: Direct coordination with Metro safety authority launched.

reports.title: Enormous pile of decomposing organic garbage
reports.description: Indiranagar restaurant lane garbage pile has been completely abandoned by cleaners. Heavy rain has caused rot, spreading foul fluids on the footpath.

location.address: Indiranagar 100 Feet Rd, Block A cross

reports.title: Wobbly, rusted street lamp pole ready to fall
reports.description: Main electrical streetlight pole near Jayanagar park has rusted completely at the base. It sways alarmingly in high winds, threatening kids playing in the park.

location.address: Jayanagar 4th Block, 9th Main Beside Civic Park

reports.title: Resolved: Drinking water supply pipe crack sealed
reports.description: Severe clean drinking water leakage has been successfully repaired and the road patch cemented back after rapid response reporting.

location.address: Malleshwaram 15th Cross Lane, Ward 10

reports.title: Open drainage manhole overflowing toxic muck
reports.description: The concrete cover of the sewer maintenance pit was fractured and collapsed. Filthy sewerage is pouring onto Koramangala block streets.

location.address: Koramangala 80 Feet Road, block 3 near center

reports.title: Illegal fencing of civic park entrance
reports.description: High metal fencing has been erected privately across 20% of the civic community park gate, forcing children to squeeze through a tiny side opening.

location.address: HSR Layout Sector 4, near central playground park

reports.title: Deep Pothole Grid under flyover crossing
reports.description: A series of 5 sharp, deep potholes are present under the flyover underpass, disrupting driving and causing severe peak-hour traffic backlogs.

location.address: Domlur Flyover Underpass, Old Airport Rd

reports.title: Damaged high-mast stadium street lamp blinking
reports.description: The main stadium road high-mast lamp is blinking rapidly like a strobe light, causing extreme visual strain and driver distractions.

location.address: Richmond Road opp. Football Stadium Entrance

reports.title: Unattended Commercial Plastics Dump in market lane
reports.description: Tons of commercial plastic packing material have been dumped by wholesalers onto the market sidewalk, blocking shopping entry corridors.

location.address: Shivaji Nagar Bus Stand Alley, Commercial Zone

reports.title: Household pipeline leakage flooded walkway
reports.description: A private household pipe feeding to a rooftop storage tank cracked, spilling non-stop clean water out of the balcony onto the narrow street below.

location.address: Indiranagar 12th Main cross, residential lane

reports.title: Stormwater drain successfully desilted
reports.description: The primary storm water channel has been cleaned before monsoon rains. All silt has been removed to allow free drainage flow.

location.address: Banashankari 2nd Stage, near main ring road

reports.title: Illegal roadside vehicle service shop on corner
reports.description: An auto repair shop operator is using the primary turning corner sidewalk to store dismantled vehicles and waste motor oil.

location.address: Yeswanthpur Market lane crossing, near station

reports.title: Dangerous hanging wires
reports.description: Hanging power wires near my house represent an extreme hazard.

location.address: Sector 3, Bangalore

reports.grievance_letter:
### FORMAL CIVIL GRIEVANCE PETITION

**To,**
The Office of the Electrical Executive Engineer,
Electrical Division,
Bruhat Bengaluru Mahanagara Palike (BBMP),
Ward 120 (D'Souza Layout),
India - 560001.

**Subject:** Urgent Public Grievance regarding unresolved Live 'streetlight' - Dangerous hanging wires

**Reference:** Citizen Photo & GIS Evidence Uploaded (Portal: https://sahaya.bbmp.gov.in)

**Date:** June 23, 2026

**Respected Madam/Sir,**

I am writing to draw your urgent attention to a hazardous and disruptive civic issue at the following location:
- **Exact Address/Landmark:** Sector 3, Bangalore
- **Issue Category:** STREETLIGHT
- **Reporter's Description:** Hanging power wires near my house represent an extreme hazard.

We have captured and chemically timestamped photographic evidence confirming the severity of this issue. Under the official Citizen Charter and grievance rules of **Bruhat Bengaluru Mahanagara Palike (BBMP)**, the maximum Service Level Agreement (SLA) time committed for resolving this type of infrastructure grievance is **48 Hours**.

As a tax-paying citizen and concerned resident of Ward 120 (D'Souza Layout), I formally request you to kindly deploy immediate service personnel to execute necessary repairs and bring this to an orderly resolution before the expiry of the **48-hour** SLA window. Public safety and convenience are currently severely compromised.

Thank you. We look forward to your proactive response.

**Yours Sincerely,**
Registered Citizen, NagarSevak Platform.

### आधिकारिक नागरिक शिकायत पत्र

**सेवा में,**
माननीय Electrical Executive Engineer कार्यालय,
Electrical Division प्रभाग,
Bruhat Bengaluru Mahanagara Palike (BBMP),
Ward 120 (D'Souza Layout),
भारत - 560001।

**विषय:** लंबित समस्या 'streetlight' - Dangerous hanging wires के संबंध में तत्काल कार्रवाई हेतु।

**संदर्भ:** संवर्धित नागरिक फोटो एवं जीआईएस (GIS) साक्ष्य (पोर्टल: https://sahaya.bbmp.gov.in)।

**दिनांक:** २३ जून, २०२६

**आदरणीय महोदया/महोदय,**

मैं स्थानीय क्षेत्र में व्याप्त एक गंभीर नागरिक समस्या की ओर आपका त्वरित ध्यान आकर्षित करना चाहता हूँ। यह समस्या निम्नलिखित स्थान पर बनी हुई है:
- **सटीक स्थान/लैंडमार्क:** Sector 3, Bangalore
- **शिकायत का प्रकार:** STREETLIGHT
- **शिकायत का विवरण:** Hanging power wires near my house represent an extreme hazard.

हमने इस समस्या की पुष्टि करने वाले सटीक फोटो साक्ष्य संकलित व अपलोड कर दिए हैं। **Bruhat Bengaluru Mahanagara Palike (BBMP)** के आधिकारिक नागरिक चार्टर और शिकायत निवारण नियमावली के तहत, इस विशिष्ट शिकायत के निवारण हेतु अधिकतम सेवा स्तर समझौता (SLA) अवधि **48 घंटे** स्वीकृत है।

अतः Ward 120 (D'Souza Layout) के एक सजग नागरिक के रूप में, मेरा आपसे विनम्र निवेदन है कि जनहित, जन सुरक्षा और सुगम यातायात को ध्यान में रखते हुए इस **48-घंटे** की तय समय सीमा के भीतर तत्काल मरम्मत कार्य या उचित कार्रवाई सुनिश्चित करने के लिए संबंधित कर्मियों को निर्देशित करें।

सहयोग हेतु कोटिशः धन्यवाद।

**भवदीय/भवदीया,**
पंजीकृत नागरिक, नगरसेवक (NagarSevak) मंच।

### आधिकारिक नागरिक शिकायत पत्र

**संदर्भ:** संवर्धित नागरिक फोटो एवं जीआईएस (GIS) साक्ष्य (पोर्टल: https://sahaya.bbmp.gov.in)।

**दिनांक:** २३ जून, २०२६

**आदरणीय महोदया/महोदय,**

मैं स्थानीय क्षेत्र में व्याप्त एक गंभीर नागरिक समस्या की ओर आपका त्वरित ध्यान आकर्षित करना चाहता हूँ। यह समस्या निम्नलिखित स्थान पर बनी हुई है:
- **सटीक स्थान/लैंडमार्क:** Test address
- **शिकायत का प्रकार:** POTHOLE
- **शिकायत का विवरण:** A secondary description for verification

हमने इस समस्या की पुष्टि करने वाले सटीक फोटो साक्ष्य संकलित व अपलोड कर दिए हैं। **Bruhat Bengaluru Mahanagara Palike (BBMP)** के आधिकारिक नागरिक चार्टर और शिकायत निवारण नियमावली के तहत, इस विशिष्ट शिकायत के निवारण हेतु अधिकतम सेवा स्तर समझौता (SLA) अवधि **24 घंटे** स्वीकृत है।

अतः Ward 120 (D'Souza Layout) के एक सजग नागरिक के रूप में, मेरा आपसे विनम्र निवेदन है कि जनहित, जन सुरक्षा और सुगम यातायात को ध्यान में रखते हुए इस **24-घंटे** की तय समय सीमा के भीतर तत्काल मरम्मत कार्य या उचित कार्रवाई सुनिश्चित करने के लिए संबंधित कर्मियों को निर्देशित करें।

सहयोग हेतु कोटिशः धन्यवाद।

**भवदीय/भवदीया,**
